verdict: FOREO LUNA 2 delivers reliable sonic cleansing with T-Sonic technology across multiple facial zones using medical-grade silicone. While excellent for foundational cleansing, the original LUNA lacks the advanced smart features present in newer LUNA 3.

_research.name: FOREO LUNA 2 Sonic Facial Cleansing Brush
_research.con: Lacks AI skin detection and smart app connectivity available in LUNA 3 successor model.
